items.phrase: What kind of work are you focused on?
items.cn: 这个表达适合在工作沟通里使用，语气自然，不会太书面.
examples: What kind of work are you focused on? We can decide after we have more context.
What kind of work are you focused on? I just want to make sure we're being practical.
What kind of work are you focused on? Let me know what you think.
dialogue: What kind of work are you focused on?
That makes sense. Let's go with that for now.
